codeReview.summary: The fix fully addresses the prior scrutiny gaps. The dashboard no longer exposes raw details-source identifiers in the visible badge, and the older-history fallback now uses explicit Leagueback wording while leaving underlying behavior unchanged. I did not find any blocking or non-blocking regressions within the scoped copy-truthfulness contract.

summary: Reviewed the feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, relevant dashboard code, and shared-state docs. The commit cleanly fixes both prior copy-truthfulness findings and stays within the scoped UI-label/copy surface, so this review passes.
